title: Sustainability
content:
Sustainably Sourced, E-Bike Delivered

Caring for your pet shouldn't cost the Earth. We built our supply chain in Kenya to eliminate international shipping carbon, packaging waste, and diesel exhaust.

Key Pillars of Our Green Operations

  • Zero-Emissions E-Bike Logistics: Last-mile deliveries are carried out using quiet electric cargo bikes (e-bikes) from Loki Logistics.
  • Carbon Logic of Sourcing Locally: Sourcing directly from Nakuru, Homa Bay, and Nairobi farms reduces food miles and transport emissions by up to 95%.
  • ISO Auditing & Standardized Logistics: Loki Logistics is actively undergoing environmental EMS audit certification for ISO 14001 and quality QMS certification for ISO 9001.
  • Eco-Friendly Kraft Paper Packaging: We package in durable, biodegradable kraft paper bags and support a Bag-Return program to keep plastic out of local Nairobi wetlands.
excerpt: Learn about our e-bike delivery philosophy, green credentials of local sourcing, and our journey to ISO certification.
